CustomField.description: Lookup (not Master-Detail) to VS_Facility__c, denormalized off VS_Session__c for sharing/reporting convenience (design §2.3) -- lets facility-scoped sharing rules (VS-20, REQ-053) and dashboards key off the appointment directly instead of joining through Session. Lookup because Facility is shared reference data (Public Read Only) that must never cascade-delete its bookings. Set by VS_BookingService.book() (VS-09) -- not defaulted or automated by this ticket. deleteConstraint=Restrict so a facility with existing appointments cannot be deleted out from under its booking history.
CustomField.label: Facility
